prerequisites.value: Intimidating Prowess, member of an order.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you use the Intimidate skill to improve a target’s attitude, if your check result exceeds the DC by 5 or more, the target’s attitude is improved for 5d6 hours. During this time, should it attack you, the target immediately becomes shaken for 1d6+1 rounds, as though it had been demoralized. Get this book AND support this site!
